risks: Auth session regressions can break billing access control.
Stripe webhook drift can desynchronize subscription state.
Schema changes can orphan customer or subscription records.
Auth secret misconfiguration can break session validation.
Password hashing or user schema drift can block signup and login.
Missing health probes can hide broken deploys.
Missing trace or error-reporting env can erase release visibility.
Schema changes can break deployment telemetry or readiness logging.
Schema drift between Prisma client and migrations.
Missing env values for database access.
Build-only regressions hidden by fast local runs.
Type drift across app router boundaries.
